titleStmt.title: SII 9.326: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 326. (A.R. No. 739 of 1922.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE MANDAPA OF THE KUMARASVAMI TEMPLE ON THE KUMARASVAMI HILL NEAR SANDUR, SANDUR STATE.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 1127, Krōdhana, Phālguṇa, ba. amāvāsye, Vaḍḍavāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1206, March 11, Saturday, when there was a solar eclipse. It belongs to the reign of the Hoysaḷa king Vīra-Ballāḷa (II). Under his orders, his chief minister and commander of the army, Mahadēva-Daṇḍanāyaka, restored the grant of the village Keṟeyapaḷḷi, which Kṛishṇarāja of the Rāshṭrakūṭa family had made formerly for daily offerings to the god Shaṇmukha, and placed it in the charge of Vishṇukara-Brahmachāri. There is a eulogy in verse of the Yādava race in the beginning of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrījayābhyudayaśca . bra
hmaskaṁdāya namaḥ . jayatyā
viṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ da
kṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭāgraviśrāntabhuva
naṁ vapuḥ . śrīmadumānandanana khiḷā
marasēnādhipati mayūraratha suttrā mamaṇi
mukuṭaraṁjitakōmaḷapadanosedu māḷke nima
gabhimatamaṁ . khyātaṁ brahmajanatriyatritana
yaṁ sōmaṁ sudhāsūtisaṁbhūtaṁ ñaṁ bu
dhasūnu pūrunarapaṁ tatsūnu tānāyu
tajjātaṁ tannahuṣaṁ yayāti nahuṣāpatyaṁ
yayātyātmasaṁjātaṁ tāṁ yadu
yādavānvayamadaṁtāytātaniṁlōka
doḷ . vibhavāmarēṁdranūrjjitaśubhatun
gaṁ jitavirōdhi yādavavaṁśajaprabhavaṁ bhū
bhuvanaikaprabhu raṭṭaramēru kṛṣṇarājan nega
ḷdaṁ . Asuhṛdbhūpālabhūbhṛddaḷana
paṭupaviprakhyadōrddaṁḍanuddaṁḍasama
grōgrārisēnādhavadavadahanaṁ vi
śrutārātibhūpaprasarāṁbhōrāśikuṁbhō
dbhavanamaḷayaśaṁ dharmmadharmmātmajātaṁ pe
sarvettaṁkṛṣṇabhūpālakanatu
ḷabaḷaṁ gaṁḍamārttaṇḍadēvaṁ . Ātaṁ viśēṣa
bhaktisamētātmaṁ ṣaṇmukhaṁge naivē
dyārtthaṁ prītataṭāka nāma khyātagrā
mamanūnaguṇanidhi yittaṁ .
mattaṁ . bhyāḷaguṇānvitārigajakēsari vai
rinṛpābdamāḷikābhīḷatarānilaṁ ri
pumahīpatibhūjakuṭhāranugrabhū
pālakubhṛnnikāyakuliśāyudhanānata
śatru vīraballāḷananūnayādavakula pra
bhavaṁ pesarvvettanurvviyoḷ . tatpāda padmō
pajīvi . manasijamūrtti māgadhaja
nāmarabhūjanaśēṣavairikānanadavapāvakaṁ
ripuphaṇīṁdragarutmanarātidaṇḍanāthanikara
kaṁjakuṁjarananūnayaśōnidhi sōma
saikabāvanī mahadēvamantri negaḷdaṁ śaraṇā
gatavajrapaṁjaraṁ . puruṣārtthada kaṇi
nābharaṇaṁ kēdāradēvadivyaśrīpadayu
gasarasijabhṛṁgaṁ śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁ jaram

pesarvettaṁ . birudaṁkabhī
manānatavirōdhi ballāḷa
bhūmipālakapādāṁ
bhōruhōpajīvi negaḷdaṁ
śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁ
jaraṁ mahadēvaṁ .
svasti samastabhuvanā
śrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha
mahārājādhirāja
paramēśvaraṁ paramabha
ṭṭārakaṁ yādavakulāṁ
baradyumaṇi sammya
ktacūḍamaṇi male
rājarājaṁ malaparoḷgaṁ
ḍaṁ kadanapracaṁḍanasahā
yaśauryya śanivārasi
ddhi giridurggamalla ni
śśaṁkapratāpacakkra
vartti hoysaḷarā
ya vīraballāḷadēva
nakhaṁḍabhūmaṇḍaḷamaṁ
nijabhujadaṇḍamaṇḍi
tamaṁḍaḷāgradi
nuṁḍige sādhyaṁ māḍi tun
gabhadrānadītīrada ma
dhuvanada nelevīḍino
ḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōda
diṁ rājyaṁgeyyutta
mire . © svasti sa
mastapraśastisahitaṁ
śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēnā
pati bāhattaraniyō
gādhipati yanēkadēśā
dhipati sakaḷalakṣmīpati
śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁja
ra kēdāradēvadivyaśrīpā
dārādhakanuṁ parabaḷa
sādhakanumappa maha
dēvadaṇḍanāyakaṁ

nijasvāmiyappa vīraballāḷadēvanājñeyiṁ śaka
nṛpavarṣada 1127 neya krōdhanasaṁva
tsarada phālguṇa bahuḷadamāvāsya vaḍḍavāra
daṁdu sūryyagrahaṇanimittaṁ
muṁnaṁ śrīsvāmidēvargge kṛṣṇarājaṁ koṭṭa .
Antādharmmaṁ bahukālāntadoḷanta
risaladane ballāḷamahīkāṁtāmātyaṁ
sthiramappantu punarddattamāgi vinayadi
nittaṁ . Acaḷitadhairyyaṁ mahadēva
camūpaṁ keṟeyapaḷḷiyaṁ kuḍalo
ḍamāryyacarita viṣṇukarabrahmacāri paḍe
daṁ guhaṁge naivēdyārtthaṁ . jiṣṇupra
mukhaṁ surārccitaviṣṇupadāṁbhōja
madhukaraṁ sakaḷakaḷāniṣṇātaṁ pesarvettaṁ
viṣṇukarabrahmacāridēvaṁ dhareyoḷ .
Ā keṟeyapaḷḷiya paścimasīmā
pramāṇamā Ūriṁ hoṁnno ṟeyapaḷḷi
ge hōda kālvaṭṭeyiṁ teṁkalirdda beḷguppe Ā
kuppeyiṁ saitu baḍagal lakhkheyaga is written below the line with a kākapada.
nakaṭṭi Ā Ūra Uttarasīmāpramā
ṇaṁ saṁḍūriṁ teṁkalirdda Oṟavinakuppe Ā kuppe
yiṁ mūḍal kaḍavinabeṁce Ā Ūra pū
rvvasīmāpramāṇaṁ teṁkamuṁtāgi parvvida dēvagiri
Ā Ūra dakṣiṇasīmāpramāṇa . viśēṣōkti
prayōjakamalleraḍeḍegaṁ svāmibhēdamilla
ppudu kāraṇamāgi . kuruguhakā
śīkṣētrōtkaradoḷ sūryyōparāgamāgu
ttire sāsirakapilegaḷaṁ dvijargādaradiṁdaṁ dakṣi
ṇānvitaṁ koṭṭa phalaṁ . samanikumolaviṁdī dharmma
manāraydoḍe kaḍaṁgi kiḍisidoḍā gōsa
mudayamaṁ dvijarumanaḷida mahā pāta
kamaneyduguṁ tatkṣaṇadoḷ . svadattāṁ para
dattāṁ vā pālayanti vasuṁdharāṁ ya
sya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phalaṁ .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdha
rāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁjāya
tē krimiḥ . gāmēkāṁ ratnikāmēkāṁ bhūmē
rapyēkamaṁgulaṁ haraṁnarakamāpnōti yā
vadābhūtasaṁplavaṁ . śāsanamidēvude
lliya śāsanamārittarēke salisuve nānī śāsa
namaneṁba pātaka bhāsuratara rauravakke gaḷaga
ḷaniḷiguṁ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī ©
Digital edition of SII 9.326 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
